name: RZVDUPD
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[RZVDUPD] ON [dbo].[SIPARISFISLERI]
FOR UPDATE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @INS_STATUS AS SMALLINT
DECLARE @INS_RZV AS SMALLINT
DECLARE @SB_REF AS INT
DECLARE @INS_KAPALI AS INT

DECLARE @DEL_STATUS AS SMALLINT
DECLARE @DEL_RZV AS SMALLINT
DECLARE @DEL_KAPALI AS INT

DECLARE @SIPRZVKUL AS INT
SELECT @SIPRZVKUL=SIPRZVKUL FROM GENELTANIMLAR WITH(NOLOCK)
IF ISNULL(@SIPRZVKUL,0)>0 
BEGIN
	DECLARE cur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
	select RZV,SB_REF,STATUS,KAPALI from INSERTED
	OPEN cur;  
	FETCH NEXT FROM cur 
	INTO @INS_RZV,@SB_REF,@INS_STATUS,@INS_KAPALI;
	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
	BEGIN
 		SELECT @DEL_RZV=RZV,@DEL_STATUS=STATUS,@DEL_KAPALI=KAPALI FROM DELETED WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF
		IF(ISNULL(@INS_RZV,0)>0)
		BEGIN
            IF (ISNULL(@DEL_STATUS,0)=4 AND (@INS_STATUS=1 OR @INS_STATUS=2)) OR (ISNULL(@DEL_KAPALI,0)=0 AND (@INS_KAPALI=1))
			BEGIN
				EXEC dbo.REZERVEIPTALSB @SB_REF,0
			END
		END
	FETCH NEXT FROM cur
	INTO @INS_RZV,@SB_REF,@INS_STATUS,@INS_KAPALI;
	END  
	CLOSE cur;  
	DEALLOCATE cur;
END
